name: VS Code Lookup
description: Fuzzy-search and open recently-used VS Code, VSCodium and Code-OSS folders, files and workspaces

preferences.name: Trigger keyword
preferences.description: Keyword used to invoke the extension in Ulauncher

preferences.name: Excluded environment variables
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of environment variables to strip before launching VS Code (e.g. PYTHONPATH,VIRTUAL_ENV)
